name: suede_music_generation
description: Suede Labs original music generation service for agents, creators, brands, game studios, app developers, podcasters, ad teams, and crypto communities that need a rights-aware, fingerprinted music track from a text prompt. Generates AI music suitable for background scoring, social posts, ads, promos, app soundtracks, character themes, token launches, lofi loops, cinematic cues, and vocal demos. Each track is delivered with a Suede share URL plus a provenance fingerprint that resolves through the Suede IP Registry on Base for downstream attestation, licensing, and royalty workflows. Built for paid x402 and ACP agent commerce.

prompt.description: Describe the song you want to create. Include genre, mood, instruments, and any specific vibe.
examples: An upbeat 80s synthwave instrumental with driving bassline, neon arpeggios, and 120 BPM energy.
A 30-second ambient lofi beat with vinyl crackle, mellow electric piano, and late-night studio mood.

durationSeconds.description: Length of the generated track in seconds. Use shorter durations for stings, longer for background scoring.

make_instrumental.description: When true, generates an instrumental track without vocals. Defaults to true for broad licensing flexibility.

custom_mode.description: When true, uses the lyrics provided in 'lyrics' verbatim instead of auto-generating from the prompt.

lyrics.description: Custom lyrics to sing. Required when custom_mode is true.

vocal_gender.description: Preferred vocal gender when vocals are enabled.

tags.description: Optional comma-separated keywords stored with the generated asset.

examples.prompt: A 30-second cinematic synthwave background track for an AI music app launch, neon energy, driving bass, modern production.
